measurement_note: Size is M, the number of first-group points, while the second group has two points. The legal 3/6/12-row tiers exercise the linear M factor of the required O(MN2^N) bitmask DP. The Accepted memoized recursion and an independent bottom-up mask DP share states. Correct endpoint-assignment enumeration explores all 2^M assignments, completes every tier, and is rejected only by scaling.
